text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm, hm, hmmm. ♪ Hm, hmmm. ♪ Okay, all
polished up.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I've poured my thoughts and prayers for
victory into polishing them up until they
sparkle. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The last race was disappointing, so this time I
want to do everything I can to prepare.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We've trained so intensely to prepare for this
day. The rest depends on my resolve, right?
choice_data_list: Go out there and do your best!
Go out there and do your best!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm off, then. I'm definitely going to win today!
